data.title: Binance released a statement on the "large short orders" before the GPS announcement: no abnormal transactions
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance released a statement on the "large short orders" before the GPS announcement on the X platform, saying that it had paid attention to the community's feedback on the "large short orders" before the GPS announcement and conducted relevant investigations at the first time. After verification, this situation is a normal market fluctuation behavior and there is no abnormal transaction.
1. Before the announcement was issued, the active selling volume in the market in the first 10 minutes compared with the first 5 minutes did increase from US$5.4 million to US$9.6 million, an increase of 1.78 times, but if the time line is extended, as shown in the figure, the increase of 1 to 4 times is within the normal fluctuation range.
2. From the historical data, it is a common phenomenon that the active buying or selling volume of GPS accounts for 40% to 60% of the total trading volume. There is no abnormal change in this ratio before and after the announcement.
3. Active "selling" behavior can be selling short or selling long, so active selling can be either opening a short position or closing a long position. Therefore, the increase in selling volume reported by the community is not limited to traders opening short positions to "lay out in advance", but also includes the behavior of users with positions closing long positions.
4. From the total number of open contracts, there is no obvious change in the contract position (i.e., the number of open contracts) between 5 minutes before the announcement and 5 minutes after the announcement, which further shows that there is no behavior of someone rushing to lay out short or long positions in advance.

data.title: BTC falls below 88,000 USDT
data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC fell below 88,000 USDT and is now at 87,993 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 2.8%. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 88,000 USDT with a 3.03% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 07, 2025, 16:22 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 88,000 USDT and is now trading at 87,768 USDT, with a narrowed 3.03% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: U.S. Government Plans Audit Of Cryptocurrency Holdings
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 8, senior White House officials disclosed plans for the United States to conduct an audit to determine the amount of cryptocurrency held by the government. This follows the establishment of a strategic Bitcoin reserve and a separate reserve for other crypto assets.

data.title: U.S. Rep. Hill: Trump should work with Congress on Bitcoin reserves
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Congressman Hill said that Trump should cooperate with Congress on the issue of Bitcoin reserves. (Jinshi)

data.title: David Sacks: ADA, SOL, and XRP are mentioned in the crypto reserve because they are ranked in the top five by market capitalization
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, David Sacks, the White House AI and encryption director, said that ADA, SOL, and XRP were mentioned in the encryption reserves because these cryptocurrencies ranked in the top five in market value.

data.title: A whale deposited 2,325 BNB worth $1.4 million to Binance after 5 years of silence
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale has just deposited 2,325 BNB worth $1.4 million to Binance after being silent for 5 years. Seven years ago, the whale withdrew 42,425 BNB from Binance at a price of $15.28.

data.title: White House: US to begin audit of current cryptocurrency holdings
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to a senior White House official at the crypto industry summit held today, after establishing the US strategic Bitcoin reserve and other digital asset reserves, the first step will be to audit the amount of cryptocurrency held by the US government. Trump has signed an executive order to create a separate reserve of strategic Bitcoin reserves and other digital assets, and will use cryptocurrencies confiscated in legal proceedings for capitalization. (Bloomberg)

data.title: A whale holding a short position of 502.65 BTC on Hyperliquid added 1 million USDC margin 7 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the address 0x5D2...39Bb7 opened a 20x short order on Hyperliquid at the highest point of BTC's recent rebound on March 3, and did not close the position when it fell to $81,500. The floating profit was as high as $7.2 million at the peak. He currently still holds 502.65 BTC short positions (about $45.01 million), with an opening price of $95,824.5 and a liquidation price of $102,730. He has now made a floating profit of $3.15 million. 7 hours ago, he added 1 million USDC margin to Hyperliquid, and it seems that he has no intention of closing the position for the time being.

data.title: LastPass Breach in 2022 Linked to Significant Cryptocurrency Theft
data.description: According to Foresight News, blockchain investigator ZachXBT has revealed that the password manager LastPass was breached in 2022, resulting in the theft of cryptocurrency valued in the nine-figure range. The team at LastPass has reportedly been concealing the full extent of the attack and has allegedly engaged in aggressive tactics against numerous confirmed victims. Recently, in a forfeiture complaint, law enforcement authorities have publicly acknowledged the possibility that LastPass could be held accountable for the stolen cryptocurrency.
